ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual in years */,
  "ethanol_consumption" INTEGER /* Ethanol consumption in mg */,
  "fatty_liver" INTEGER /* Indicator for fatty liver (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference in cm */,
  "waist_to_height_ratio" REAL /* Waist-to-height ratio */,
  "bmi_category" INTEGER /* BMI category (e.g., underweight, normal, overweight, obese) */,
  "obesity_status" INTEGER /* Obesity status (0 for not obese, 1 for obese) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the individual in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the individual in kg */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual for home visits or mail */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the individual (e.g., A, B, AB, O) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* A text field to store any relevant medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* A text field to store any known allergies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for lifestyle factors record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with these factors */,
  "alcohol_use" INTEGER /* Alcohol usage level (0 for no, 1 for low, 2 for moderate, 3 for high) */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Smoking status (0 for non-smoker, 1 for current smoker, 2 for former smoker) */,
  "systolic_bp" REAL /* Systolic blood pressure in mmHg */,
  "diastolic_bp" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg */,
  "dietary_habits" TEXT /* A text field to store dietary habits */,
  "sleep_pattern" TEXT /* A text field to store sleep patterns */,
  "stress_level" INTEGER /* A numeric field to store stress level (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followups" (
  "followup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for follow-up record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with this follow-up */,
  "followup_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the follow-up intervention */,
  "followup_type" TEXT /* Type of follow-up (e.g., in-person, phone call, email) */,
  "followup_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the follow-up visit in minutes */,
  "next_followup_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("followup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followups_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bmi_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for BMI category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the BMI category */,
  "range_start" REAL /* Starting value of the BMI range */,
  "range_end" REAL /* Ending value of the BMI range */,
  "recommended_weight_range" TEXT /* A text field to store the recommended weight range for the BMI category */,
  "health_risks" TEXT /* A text field to store health risks associated with the BMI category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obesity_classes" (
  "obesity_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for obesity class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the obesity class */,
  "bmi_start" REAL /* Starting value of the BMI for this class */,
  "bmi_end" REAL /* Ending value of the BMI for this class */,
  "recommended_interventions" TEXT /* A text field to store recommended interventions for the obesity class */,
  "health_risks" TEXT /* A text field to store health risks associated with the obesity class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obesity_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
